name: Bernie Mac
blurb: Kings of Comedy force; fearless storyteller.
bio: Bernie Mac commanded the stage with fearless, intimate storytelling, the I ain't scared of you bravado of The Original Kings of Comedy. He turned raising his sister's kids into a hit sitcom before his death at 50.
accolades: The Bernie Mac Show earned multiple Emmy nominations
Kings of Comedy was the top-grossing comedy tour of its time
